name: Polish Kraut'n Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the sauerkraut and squeeze out any excess moisture.
2. Place half of the drained sauerkraut into a slow cooker.
3. Cut the sausage into 2-inch pieces and add them to the slow cooker.
(You can use bratwurst instead of Polish sausage.)
4. Layer the apples, brown sugar, salt, pepper, and caraway seeds (if using) on top of the sausage.
5. Cover with the remaining sauerkraut.
6. Pour in apple juice or cider.
7. Cook on high for 3 to 3½ hours or on low for 6 to 7 hours until apples are tender.
8. Stir before serving.
